title: アウトロー・アゲイン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the morning, at the station near Tracen
Academy...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There're so many people here every single
morning...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the old guys decked out in suits and
super straight ties...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Until just a little while ago, I was lookin' down on
them, thinkin' their lives were so boring. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's amazing. You're all so amazing...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Goin' to work in an office every day is really
something, isn't it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, they go to the same place and do the
same thing every day, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like only really strong people can put up
with somethin' like that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The only reason to keep doin' the same boring
thing over and over is either to win, or because
you're doin' it for someone else...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I can't do that! It's in my blood to seek
constant stimulation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I see somethin' dazzling, my heart is drawn
to it, and I immediately wanna go to it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's my nature. I must've got it from my pops,
but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I really think about it, it's how I've always
been.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and I recall all the things that put a
sparkle in her eye...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Derby... The once-in-a-lifetime battle I just
couldn't miss. That was so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The drag race we saw at the summer camp. Those
guys were so cool, puttin' everythin' on the line
for just that brief moment.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fleeting moments like that steal my heart.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I'm still just a kid inside? Am I gonna
have to grow out of it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I don't... does that mean, I'm not gonna be able
to move forward anymore?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My pops never changed. He may not be the
greatest in everyone's eyes, but he's leadin' a cool
life.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I've gotta fall in line in order to go to higher
places, then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What am I supposed to do? Do I have to be all mature to compete in senior year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, Vodka gets stuck between strength
and coolness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the higher the stakes, the harder it is
to maintain your own style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When you're growing up, there are things that
change and things that don't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That passion for cool stuff is such a fundamental
thing—such a motivating factor—it's a strength in
and of itself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A strength? Just bein' inspired by cool stuff?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you sure that's not a weakness?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So I can keep goin' like this if I believe in my
strength?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give my reassurance. Vodka has to win in her
own way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If not, she won't be satisfied. She won't be able to
say she really lived.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y'know... I really am glad you're with me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I start strayin' over to the beaten path,
you laugh me off of it and back onto my own trail.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm me! I've gotta keep goin' the way
I want to.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna beat those office workers, I've gotta
perfect my own style even more.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I honestly don't even know what coolness I'm
gonna want to chase next. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I've just gotta do my best like the outlaw I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The twinkle that was in Vodka's eyes at her debut
has finally returned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like she can finally see her next step.
